query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS feature_packages (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  features JSON,
  is_addon BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  addon_price DECIMAL(10,2),
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_slug (slug)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS organization_features (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  organization_id INT NOT NULL,
  feature_slug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  custom_config JSON,
  enabled_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_org_feature (organization_id, feature_slug),
  INDEX idx_org (organization_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_announcements (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  feature_slug VARCHAR(100),
  is_paid_update BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  cost DECIMAL(10,2),
  auto_install BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  target_tiers JSON,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  published_at DATETIME,
  INDEX idx_published (published_at)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS organization_announcements (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  organization_id INT NOT NULL,
  announcement_id INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('unread', 'read', 'accepted', 'declined') DEFAULT 'unread',
  viewed_at DATETIME,
  responded_at DATETIME,
  FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (announcement_id) REFERENCES system_announcements(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_org_announcement (organization_id, announcement_id),
  INDEX idx_org_status (organization_id, status)
);

  status ENUM('unread', 'read', 'accepted', 'declined') DEFAULT 'unread',
